scatter.match: Ivory Coast vs Serbia and Montenegro

findings.title: Closing Line Value (CLV)
findings.detail: Lay bets placed on Group B teams right before the break window yield statistically significant positive closing value.

findings.title: Odds Drop-off Correlation
findings.detail: High correlation indicates that in-play odds shifts drop rapidly during defensive decay windows, showing informed arbitrage.

findings.title: Break Window Trading Spikes
findings.detail: Exchange volume spikes by 35% on average during the 65-80th minute window for Group B leading matches.
